presets.name: Example Preset (Delete Me)
presets.customPromptText:
# Translation Preset Template

**Direction:** [Source Language] → [Target Language]
**Domain:** [e.g., Legal, Medical, Technical, Academic]

---

## DO NOT TRANSLATE
<!-- List brand names, proper nouns, institution names -->
- [Company Name]
- [Product Names]
- [Personal Names]

---

## ACRONYM HANDLING

### Translate to Target Language
| Source | Target |
|--------|--------|
| [acronym] | [translation] |

### Keep in Source Language
<!-- List acronyms that should remain unchanged -->
- [acronym1]
- [acronym2]

---

## DOMAIN GLOSSARY
<!-- Add term pairs for your specific domain -->

| Source Term | Target Term |
|-------------|-------------|
| [term] | [translation] |

---

## FORMATTING RULES

### Numbers
| Format | Source | Target |
|--------|--------|--------|
| Decimals | 0.05 | 0,05 |
| Thousands | 1,509 | 1.509 |
| Currency | $1,234.56 | $1.234,56 |

### Dates
| Source Format | Target Format |
|---------------|---------------|
| MM/DD/YYYY | DD/MM/YYYY |
| December 26, 2025 | 26 de diciembre de 2025 |

---

## STYLE NOTES
<!-- Formality, tone, regional preferences -->
- Formality level: [formal/informal]
- Regional variant: [e.g., Colombian Spanish, British English]
- Special considerations: [any domain-specific style rules]

---

Translate to [Target Language]:

_readme: This is a TEMPLATE file. Your actual presets are stored in user_presets/translation_presets.json (gitignored). Create presets via the UI - they will be saved privately.
